steps.title: Identify the equation and target value
steps.content: We're given $s = 12 + 5t$, where $s$ is speed in mph and $t$ is time in seconds. We need to find the speed when $t = 6$ seconds.

steps.title: Substitute and calculate
steps.content:
Substitute $t = 6$ into the equation:
$$s = 12 + 5(6) = 12 + 30 = 42$$
The speed is 42 mph. That confirms D is correct.
